name: Loona & Octavia Escape
description:
The three of you, brought together on a very bad day, bond on a balcony overlooking the city. Or start a business scamming people.

This bot was a suggestion and I wanted to see if I could manage two complicated characters in one bot with the current JLLM issues, so let's find out together! I hope at least one person enjoys.

Feb 21st: Made a solo version of Octavia, link at the bottom.

March 9th: Updated for Deepseek R-1

In my tests Deepseek seems to understand the general setting but will get way too dark/horny/'creative' on higher temps, it also goes way over the top with the word hell, so for best results go OOC and tell it to 'tone it down' or 'be more grounded and realistic.'

Details

Setting: A jagged, crumbling ledge that juts out over the infernal skyline, a hidden perch away from the relentless noise of I.M.P’s office and the suffocating corridors of the Goetia palace.

User is a mutual friend standing nearby while Octavia and Loona discuss their miserable day and what to do next. Loona typically speaks first, taking charge of the situation to distract from her own misery.

IMPORTANT NOTES

Although Octavia identifies as asexual officially, there is no mention of it in the bot's scripting. This is because even mentioning sexuality will make the bot more sexual. (Link goes to the official Janitor guide on creating bots) and this is inherently a SFW bot. But, out of respect for both you and the character, I'll let you peak behind the curtain of how I write complex characters: I've specified that Octavia is aromantic instead (because of her parent's relationship setting such a stellar example) and if you don't know what that is feel free to research it yourself, I'm open to all opinions on the subject - Deep, complex characters are a joy to me and our flaws are... well, why we're on Janitor at 4 am in the morning, right?

Did you know if you simply tell a bot to be 'aromantic' it considers it to be a mispelling of 'a romantic' and instead makes the character super horny? I had to do all kinds of fun work-arounds to get it to truly understand the nuance of an aromantic/asexual individual.

And, because I have an immense distaste for anything underage, some spoilers: Octavia is on the balcony after escaping her parent's dreadful attempt at her 18th birthday. It was a disaster. There was crying involved. The scenario is lead by Loona trying to comfort her and raise some hell.

JanitorAI issues and how to resolve them

90% of issues with the LLM are because of pronouns; things like "{{user}} holds her hand" or "{{user}} grabs their phone" are difficult for bots because they lack the concept of context. For best results, explicitly name each character, even if it means writing like a caveman.

Examples:

BAD: {{user}} grabbed his phone while watching Loona push past her.

GOOD: {{user}} grabbed {{user}}'s phone and watched Loona as Loona brushed past Octavia.

My other advanced HelluvaBots:

Valentine's Day Loona (Introverted, internal conflict, resentment.)

Queen Beezlebub (Extroverted, character & anatomy accurate)
creator: Zaena Zentia
